title: AI Knowledge Base Assistant Demo
summary: Safe cached demo showing how an internal knowledge base assistant can answer questions from sanitized documentation and return source links.
steps: Breaks docs into searchable knowledge chunks
Matches user questions to the most relevant source content
Returns a clear answer with recommended next documents
Displays fake source links like a real AI knowledge base answer
Keeps private company data, internal contacts, and proprietary content out of the public demo
